message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Temperature Sensor A internal sequence

participant "Internal Sequence" as IS
participant "getSignal" as GS
participant "AD conversion" as ADC
participant "signal processing" as SP

activate IS
IS ->> GS: start
activate GS
GS ->> ADC: 
activate ADC
ADC ->> SP: 
activate SP
SP --> ADC: 
deactivate SP
ADC --> GS: 
deactivate ADC
GS --> IS: end
deactivate GS
deactivate IS

@enduml
```
